items.title: Jackery’s Early Prime Father’s Day Sale offers up to 65% power station discounts + up to 7% bonus savings – all starting from $199
items.summary:
Update 06/15: Jackery has merged its Early Prime Day savings with its Father’s Day offers, with initial prices staying the same, while the three bonus savings codes have been switched up. All the information below has been adjusted to reflect the current lineup.

Jackery has officially launched its Early Prime Day Sale with up to 65% discounts on power stations, three tiers of extra savings codes (3%, 5%, 7%), and a chance to win your order for FREE with a simple email subscription. If you want to really take advantage of the biggest savings to score a home backup companion, you can score the Jackery 5,040Wh Explorer 5000 Plus Portable Power Station with two 500W solar panels and a Smart Transfer Switch for $4,649.07 shipped (or check out the bigger bundles below), after using the code OFFER7 at checkout, beating Amazon’s pricing by $650. While it may carry a $6,499 MSRP direct from Jackery, we only ever saw it climb to that rate earlier in 2026, with things usually starting around $5,889 recently, and discounts only going as low as $4,549 back during Black Friday and $4,499 during last week’s first phase of extra savings. Now, during this sale, you’ll be getting an $1,850 markdown with the bonus savings factored in, giving you the second-best price of 2026 and the third-lowest price overall. Head below to browse the full lineup of deals.

One first-time offer during this sale is the premium Xyber Electric Bike which is getting a FREE extra battery down at $2,899.99 shipped from its full $3,300 tag. While we have been seeing this $2,900 all-time low price popping up more frequently since first being offered in February, what is really big here is the bundled extra battery that would normally cost you an additional $1,000. All in all, this deal gives you $1,400 total savings, which is the best package we have seen offered to date. We’ve also rounded up all the brand’s other e-bike offers for you down below, including the new low price on the Xafari e-bike.

items.title: Big Tech’s desperate last push at AI regulation

items.title: Hello! AirPods Pro 3 just dropped again to best price ever at $169 via Amazon (32% off)
items.summary:
Update: The deal has sold out now, but there’s still a chance it might return – they are currently listed for $10 more at $179.

Hello! Amazon just dropped AirPods Pro 3 again down to the best price ever at $169 shipped. We are now talking 32% off the list price and a particularly wild deal on the flagship Apple buds.

items.title: It’s hard to beat this LISEN Qi2.2 25W MagSafe car charger that undercuts the competition at just $21 (58% off)
items.summary:
LISEN Qi2.2 25W MagSafe Car Charger

Buy for $21 (Reg. $50)

Apply VI3P9CD2 during checkout.

What we love

Now is the time to cash in and snag this charger at just $21 if you’ve been waiting for more affordable 25W Qi2.2 car chargers to hit the market. That’s notably less than many comparable options from bigger brands, while still including a 54W car adapter in the box. The charger also supports multiple mounting configurations, making it easy to install and use in different vehicle.

items.title: Latest Amazon Echo Show 8 and Show 11 just hit all-time low pricing in early Prime Day sale (Up to 32% off)
items.summary: We have been waiting on the early Prime Day Echo deals and they have now arrived. Alongside the new all-time lows we already featured on Echo Dot Max and Echo Studio smart speakers, Amazon is now serving a host of early Prime Day discounts on its Echo smart displays including the lowest prices to date on the latest Amazon Echo Show 8 and Show 11 at over 30% off.

items.title: Samsung’s 165Hz M9 OLED Smart Monitor hits lowest price ahead of Prime Day at $400 off
items.summary: We are now tracking a deal at Samsung that gets you the M9 OLED Smart Monitor down at $1,124.99 shipped, with a $75 upgrade credit that auto-applies during checkout. That’s a solid $475 discount from its usual $1,600 price tag, and the lowest we have seen it fetch to date. This deal undercuts the current Amazon deal, where the display is sitting at the $1,200 mark. We did see a deal on this model last month that delivered better overall value with a FREE Odyssey G70D display, but today’s deal offers the best straight-up cash deal we’ve tracked for this model yet. A bunch of other Samsung monitors are discounted right now at Amazon, and you’ll find some of them highlighted below, along with more details on this model.

items.title: Save $400 on Navee’s feature-packed UT5 Ultra X electric superscooter with 43 MPH top speeds and a 76-mile range for $2,100
items.summary: Amazon is currently offering the latest Navee UT5 Ultra X Electric SuperScooter down at $2,099.99 shipped, which beats out the direct website’s current pricing, where it’s keeping to its full $2,500 tag. This new ride hit the market in February with a launch deal to $1,955, but has only been discounted as low as $2,200 since then. Now, while the brand’s direct Father’s Day Sale is not providing any savings, you can instead pick it up here with $400 slashed from the tag for the second-lowest price we have tracked. Of course, if you want to save a little more money, there’s also the less-advanced UT5 Max Electric Scooter down at $1,400 right now, beating the direct website by $400. You can learn more about this superscooter down below or by reading through our in-depth hands-on review.

items.summary:
Fanttik Flip G10 Nano Car Detailing Brush

Buy for $50 (Reg. $66)

What we love

Every car has a fairly unique layout and design with spaces where dirt, dust, and accidental spills can easily wedge their way inside. Instead of just leaving it that way or taking it in to be detailed, you can easily clean it yourself with Fanttik’s brush. It comes with several attachments, charges via USB-C, and has an integrated display.

If you have a guest room that you’d like to set up without breaking the bank, you can do a whole lot worse than this upholstered queen-size offering down at $100 shipped. The headboard features an adjustable height too, allowing you to dial in the right look for your space.

items.title: This scale quickly displays your weight trend and it’s only $15

What we love

If you don’t need a smart scale and simply want a snapshot of recent changes, this offering displays that data on it’s color display so you can get the data you need and get back to your life with no need to open an app. It’s only $15 Prime shipped too.
